message.content:
Thoroughly explore the aisuite module in this project. I need to understand:

1. The overall directory structure and all files
2. The main entry points and key types/interfaces
3. How the module is organized (packages, layers, etc.)
4. All exported functions and types
5. Dependencies and how they're used

Start by finding all files related to aisuite, then read each file to understand the code logic. Be very thorough - read every file in the aisuite directory tree.

The project root is /Users/xuwentao/Projects/tele/paas-controller
